subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down from the heaven of His Name, the Self-Subsisting, to give glad-tidings unto the people of this Day wherein hath cried out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم من سماء اسمه القیوم لیبشر القوم بهذا الیوم الذی فیه صاحت
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
